emails.subject: RE: FW: Feb-01 Invoice
emails.body: Daren did we have a purchase from Beaumont Methonal on 2/9? I show a dea= l=20 of 5.000 on deal 611178. I confirmed a total of 13.000 (deal 603107) for= =20 that day. Were we buying back 5.000 or was the deal reduced to 13000? Aimee To: Ray, Tess

emails.subject: RE: FW: Feb-01 Invoice
emails.body: We did buy 5,000 from Beamont Meth. The sale on 603107 should have been=20 confirmed at 18,000 and the buy on deal 611178 should have been confirmed a= t=20 5,000 for the 9th. D Aimee Lannou 03/19/2001 09:44 AM
